languages.text: {n}Эоганн назидательно поднимает палец.{/n} "Мое вмешательство не нарушило протоколы сервиторизации — их разум все еще следует машинным алгоритмам, ересь не было совершена. Коллега, вы чрезмерно привыкли уповать на холодную упорядоченность феррум санктум, и воспринимаете органику, как нечто мутабельное и ненадежное. А меж тем, живая клетка — один из наиболее совершенных и устойчивых агрегатов, сотворенных Омниссией".

{n}Eogunn raises a finger in a didactic manner.{/n} "My intervention did not violate the protocols of servitorisation. Their minds still follow the machine algorithms. No heresy has been committed. Colleague, you are overly accustomed to relying upon the cold orderliness of the Ferrum Sanctum and you perceive organic matter as something mutable and unreliable. Yet the living cell is one of the most perfect and stable aggregates created by the Omnissiah."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн назидательно поднимает палец.{/n} "Мое вмешательство не нарушило протоколы сервиторизации — их разум все еще следует машинным алгоритмам, ересь не было совершена. Коллега, вы чрезмерно привыкли уповать на холодную упорядоченность феррум санктум, и воспринимаете органику, как нечто мутабельное и ненадежное. Yet the living cell is one of the most perfect and stable aggregates created by the Omnissiah."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn hebt belehrend einen Finger.{/n} "Meine Intervention war kein Verstoß gegen die Protokolle der Servitorisierung. Ihr Verstand folgt noch immer den Maschinenalgorithmen. Es liegt keinerlei Ketzerei vor. Kollege, Ihr seid es zu sehr gewohnt, Euch auf die kalte Ordnung des Ferrum sanctum zu verlassen und betrachtet organische Materie als mutabel und unzuverlässig. Dabei ist die lebende Zelle eines der perfektesten und stabilsten Aggregate, die der Omnissiah geschaffen hat."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger in a didactic manner.{/n} "My intervention did not violate the protocols of servitorisation. Their minds still follow the machine algorithms. No heresy has been committed. Colleague, you are overly accustomed to relying upon the cold orderliness of the Ferrum Sanctum and you perceive organic matter as something mutable and unreliable. Yet the living cell is one of the most perfect and stable aggregates created by the Omnissiah."

Es liegt keinerlei Ketzerei vor. Kollege, Ihr seid es zu sehr gewohnt, Euch auf die kalte Ordnung des Ferrum sanctum zu verlassen und betrachtet organische Materie als mutabel und unzuverlässig. Dabei ist die lebende Zelle eines der perfektesten und stabilsten Aggregate, die der Omnissiah geschaffen hat."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn lève un doigt comme un professeur qui s'apprêterait à donner un cours.{/n} « Mon intervention n'a en rien enfreint les protocoles de servitorisation. Leur esprit suit toujours les algorithmes de la machine. Aucune hérésie n'a été commise. Honorable collègue, vous êtes trop habitué à vous fier à l'ordre froid du Ferrum Sanctum. Toute matière organique est pour vous trop changeante, trop aléatoire. Pourtant, la cellule vivante est l'un des agrégats les plus parfaits et les plus stables créés par l'Omnimessie. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger in a didactic manner.{/n} "My intervention did not violate the protocols of servitorisation. Their minds still follow the machine algorithms. No heresy has been committed. Colleague, you are overly accustomed to relying upon the cold orderliness of the Ferrum Sanctum and you perceive organic matter as something mutable and unreliable. Yet the living cell is one of the most perfect and stable aggregates created by the Omnissiah."

Toute matière organique est pour vous trop changeante, trop aléatoire. Pourtant, la cellule vivante est l'un des agrégats les plus parfaits et les plus stables créés par l'Omnimessie. »

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡竖起手指，一副说教姿态。{/n}“我的干预并未违反机仆化协议。它们的思维仍在遵循机器算法。无任何异端之举。同僚，你太习惯于依赖钢铁圣所那套冰冷的秩序，同时又视有机物为善变而不可靠之物。然而，活体细胞才是欧姆尼赛亚所造最完美、最稳定的聚合体。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger in a didactic manner.{/n} "My intervention did not violate the protocols of servitorisation. Their minds still follow the machine algorithms. No heresy has been committed. Colleague, you are overly accustomed to relying upon the cold orderliness of the Ferrum Sanctum and you perceive organic matter as something mutable and unreliable. Yet the living cell is one of the most perfect and stable aggregates created by the Omnissiah."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn levanta un dedo con gesto didáctico.{/n} «Mi intervención no infringió los protocolos de servidorización. Sus mentes aún siguen los algoritmos de la máquina. No se ha cometido herejía alguna. Mi estimado colega, está demasiado acostumbrado a depender del frío orden del ferrum sanctum y percibe la materia orgánica como algo mutable y poco fiable. Sin embargo, la célula viva es uno de los agregados más perfectos y estables creados por el Omnissiah».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger in a didactic manner.{/n} "My intervention did not violate the protocols of servitorisation. Their minds still follow the machine algorithms. No heresy has been committed. Colleague, you are overly accustomed to relying upon the cold orderliness of the Ferrum Sanctum and you perceive organic matter as something mutable and unreliable. Yet the living cell is one of the most perfect and stable aggregates created by the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn levanta un dedo con gesto didáctico.{/n} «Mi intervención no infringió los protocolos de servidorización. Sus mentes aún siguen los algoritmos de la máquina. No se ha cometido herejía alguna. Mi estimado colega, está demasiado acostumbrado a depender del frío orden del ferrum sanctum y percibe la materia orgánica como algo mutable y poco fiable. Sin embargo, la célula viva es uno de los agregados más perfectos y estables creados por el Omnissiah».

languages.text: {n}エオグンは教訓的な態度で指を立てる。{/n}「私の介入はサーヴィタ化のプロトコルに違反していない。彼らの心はまだ機械のアルゴリズムに従っている。異端は犯していない。同僚よ、あなたはフェルム聖域の冷たい秩序に頼りすぎていて、有機物を変化しやすく信頼できないものとして認識している。しかし、生きた細胞は、全知全能の神が創造された最も完全で安定した集合体の一つなのだ」。
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger in a didactic manner.{/n} "My intervention did not violate the protocols of servitorisation. Their minds still follow the machine algorithms. No heresy has been committed. Colleague, you are overly accustomed to relying upon the cold orderliness of the ferrum sanctum and you perceive organic matter as something mutable and unreliable. Yet the living cell is one of the most perfect and stable aggregates created by the Omnissiah."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, öğretici bir tavırla parmağını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Müdahalem hizmetörleşme protokollerini ihlal etmedi. Zihinleri hâlâ makine algoritmalarını izliyor. Herhangi bir kâfirlik suçu işlenmedi. Meslektaşım, kutsal demirin soğuk düzenine güvenmeye fazla alışkınsın. Organik maddeyi değişken ve güvenilmez bir şey olarak algılıyorsun. Oysa canlı hücre, Hermesih'in yarattığı en mükemmel ve istikrarlı yapılardan biridir."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger in a didactic manner.{/n} "My intervention did not violate the protocols of servitorisation. Their minds still follow the machine algorithms. Yet the living cell is one of the most perfect and stable aggregates created by the Omnissiah."
